title: Reminder: First Solar to Host Analyst Day on September 7, 2023
text: TEMPE, Ariz.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #AmericanSolar--First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSLR) (the “Company”) will host its Analyst Day on Thursday, September 7, 2023. Presentations by the Company's management team will begin at 8:30 AM ET and will include updates on First Solar's long-term business strategy, technology, and financial outlook. Attendance for the event, hosted at First Solar's manufacturing complex in Ohio, will be by invitation only. First Solar is offering a virtual attendance option. This will be comprise.

title: First Solar Establishes New Solar Industry Benchmark for Transparency with 2023 Sustainability Report
text: TEMPE, Ariz.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #AmericanSolar--First Solar, Inc. (Nasdaq: FSLR) today released its 2023 Sustainability Report and established a new industry benchmark for transparency by making public details of onsite third-party social audits conducted across its global manufacturing footprint in what is believed to be an industry first. title: First Solar Selects Louisiana for Fifth American Manufacturing Facility
text: BATON ROUGE, La. & TEMPE, Ariz.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #AmericanSolar--First Solar, Inc. (Nasdaq: FSLR) today announced that it has selected the Acadiana Regional Airport in Iberia Parish, Louisiana as the location for its previously announced fifth fully vertically integrated manufacturing facility in the United States. The facility, believed to be the single largest capital investment in the area's history, represents an investment of up to $1.1 billion in expanding America's capacity to produce its own photovolt.
